notes:
🎨 **Default theme HSL block remapped to JaoMue Pro spec.** Buttons,
cards, borders, and focus rings now render the navy + blue + cyan palette
(`#070D18` / `#2F80ED` / `#00C2FF`) from `final-handoff/tokens-final.css`
instead of the legacy bronze.

🛠 **Three modal-stack bugs fixed.** Wizard / consent / PIN-lock no longer
steal each other's events on a fresh install — operator can finish setup
and unlock without a force-quit.

### Added

- `scripts/generate-icons-from-logo.mjs` — auto-detects sharp / IM7,
  pads source to square, regenerates the entire Tauri icon set + all 10
  Microsoft Store tile sizes + landing/admin Next.js metadata icons
  from one `app/logo.png`. Skips Windows `convert.exe` because Windows
  ships its own unrelated FAT/NTFS converter on PATH.
- `PinLock` "ลืม PIN?" reset path — visible link below the unlock
  button. Two-step confirm wipes `pinHash` and unlocks; data intact.
- `AppLayout` gate priority chain — explicit ternary picks ConsentGate /
  PinLock / FirstRunWizard / app at any time. No more sibling mounting
  of Radix Dialogs over the wizard or lock screen.
- `{{LEGAL_*}}` placeholder system on `/tos` and `/privacy` plus amber
  pre-publish banners so an accidental deploy is visually obvious.
  `npm run landing:prepublish` blocks deploys until slots are filled.

### Changed

- **Default theme HSL block** in `app/src/index.css` rewritten:
  - `--background: 218 56% 6%` (`#070D18`)
  - `--card: 220 43% 11%` (`#101827`)
  - `--primary: 213 84% 56%` (`#2F80ED`, was `29 53% 36%` bronze)
  - `--accent: 191 100% 50%` (`#00C2FF`, was `33 54% 65%` gold)
  - `--border: 218 31% 22%` · `--ring: 213 84% 56%` ·
    `--destructive: 0 84% 60%`.
  - Theme id `'bronze'` kept for backward compat with persisted Zustand
    state; new alias `[data-theme='jaomue']` resolves to the same block.
- **Tauri `app_info()` Rust command** returns `name: "JaoMue Pro POS"`,
  so support tickets / crash reports land under the new label.
- **ShopQrCard** placeholder mark — first-letter-of-shopName on a JaoMue
  blue→cyan gradient (was red+gold "F").
- **Slip PDF footer / EOD report / error-log / PDPA / support diag /
  backup metadata** all read "JaoMue Pro POS" now.

### Fixed

- **Radix Dialog scroll-lock leak in `ConsentGate`** — old code returned
  `null` mid-render after consent was accepted, unmounting React without
  giving Radix's Dialog (`open={true}`) a chance to release scroll-lock
  + focus trap. The wizard mounting underneath was visible but
  un-clickable. Fix: switch to controlled `<Dialog open={showConsent}>`.
- **`FirstRunWizardHost` competed with `ConsentGate`** as siblings on
  fresh installs — z-overlay 60 over Radix z-modal 50, but Radix's
  focus trap still owned every event. Fix: gate wizard on
  `hasAcceptedCurrent(settings.legalConsent)`.
- **`PinLock` un-clickable in the same conditions** — same root cause.
  Fix: AppLayout now renders gates in a strict priority chain (ConsentGate
  → PinLock → FirstRunWizard → main app); only one mounted at any time.
- **No PIN-reset path inside the lock screen.** A forgotten or
  mis-hashed PIN locked the operator out with no in-app recovery.
- **`landing/admin` versions out of sync** — both were 3.9.2 while
  root/app shipped as 3.9.3. Now 3.9.4 across every package.
- **README + STRUCTURE + scripts/verify-* still referenced v3.9.1** —
  refreshed to current baseline.
- **Brand drift in user-facing source** — every customer-visible
  `'FAHHANG 888'` string now renders `'JaoMue Pro POS'`. JSDoc headers
  + intentional legacy-detector code paths kept (with comment).

### Removed

- **Mock legal entity data** (`1101499999999` tax ID, `02-888-8888`
  phone, `Namso99 ทดสอบระบบ` DPO) from every page that ships to
  customers. Replaced by `{{LEGAL_*}}` placeholders that the owner fills
  before deploy. Historical CHANGELOG entries left untouched.
